subject: New Request: Backend Developer – .NET – Telecom/media
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Wavemedia
ROLE: Senior Backend Developer
START: 2021-08-13
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: To be discussed

The team works primarily with .NET, AWS, Docker and MySQL.

Key requirements:
• .NET
• AWS
• Docker
• MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
